---
name: Feature request / new rule
about: Suggest a new check or capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What should linklint check or do?**
Describe the rule or feature.

**Why it matters**
What kind of broken/inconsistent link does it catch?

**Proposed rule (if applicable)**
- Suggested rule id: `my-rule`
- Default severity: error / warning / info
- Trigger condition (with a small doc example) + suggested `fix` message:

**Internal-only?**
Can it be checked without network access? (External URL checking is opt-in /
out of core scope.)
